1	---
2	name: architecture-v2-implementation-plan
3	description: "Definitive production-grade V2 implementation plan synthesizing architect, developer, planner, and designer agent outputs. Covers file audit, 35-step phased build, design contracts, cache keys, error formats, edge cases, risks, and verification checklist."
4	metadata:
5	  type: project
6	  originSessionId: bad08b6b-9006-4a4b-acea-88f62b909625
7	---
8	
9	# ARCHITECTURE_V2 — Production-Grade Implementation Plan
10	
11	> Synthesized from 4 specialized agents (architect, developer, planner, designer) on 2026-05-20.
12	> Companion specs: [[architecture-v2-complete]], [[architecture-v2-migration]], [[project-full-architecture]]
13	
14	---
15	
16	## 1. Executive Summary
17	
18	### What We're Building
19	
20	Transform LI from an agent-facing MCP tool server (10 tools agents must explicitly call) into an **invisible MCP gateway proxy** that sits between every AI agent and its real tools. The gateway intercepts `tools/list` to inject historical outcome data as natural language, and proxies `tools/call` to real upstream MCP servers. Agent code unchanged. 4 lines of JSON config.
21	
22	### The Key Architectural Insight
23	
24	LI intercepts `tools/list` — which happens BEFORE the agent reasons about which tool to use. By enriching descriptions at discovery time, LI doesn't need to intercept the decision because the decision hasn't happened yet. This is the mechanism that makes the "pre-reasoning injection" architecturally valid.
25	
26	### Code Survival: ~60% Unchanged
27	
28	| Layer | Status |
29	|-------|--------|
30	| Scoring engine (`scoring.ts`, `policy-engine.ts`) | Keep (zero changes) |
31	| MCTS simulation (all `simulation/` files) | Keep (zero changes) |
32	| 10 of 13 recommendation engine files | Keep (zero changes) |
33	| All 133 SQL migrations | Keep (1 new migration for `ingestion_source`) |
34	| All dashboard pages (15 pages, 12 hooks) | Keep (zero changes) |
35	| Training pipeline (7 files) | Keep (zero changes) |
36	| Middleware (5 files) | Keep (zero changes) |
37	| Ingestion pipeline | Keep (zero changes) |
38	| 40+ test files | Keep (updated for `'mcp'` source) |
39	| LangChain/LangGraph adapters | Keep (import converters, NOT SDKs) |
40	| SDKs (`packages/typescript-sdk/`, `packages/python-sdk/`) | Keep but isolate — disable CI/CD publish |
41	| 10 current MCP tools | **Delete** |
42	| `param-resolver.ts`, `episode-tracker.ts` | **Delete** |
43	| `task-intelligence.ts` resource | **Delete** |
44	| `agent-setup.ts` prompt | **Delete** |
45	| `index.ts`, `rest-client.ts`, `config.ts` | **Rewrite** |
46	| `outcome-orchestrator.ts` | **Modify** (add decision_id + webhook) |
47	| ~22 new files across 7 categories | **Create** |
48	
49	### Implementation Order
50	
51	```
52	Phase 0: Preparation (SDK isolation, scaffold, config, schema)
53	  → Phase 1: Gateway Proxy Core (5 files)
54	    → Phase 2: Tool Enrichment Engine (5 files)
55	      → Phase 3: Decision Tracking + Webhooks (4 files)
56	        → Phase 4: LLM Coach (2 files)
57	          → Phase 5: Safety Features (5 files)
58	            → Phase 6: Cleanup + Hardening (11 steps)
59	
60	Phases 2, 3, 4, 5 can run in parallel once Phase 1 completes.
61	Estimated: 8-10 days (2 devs) or 12-17 days (1 dev).
62	```
63	
64	---
65	
66	## 2. Design Contracts (Build These First)
67	
68	### 2.1 Core TypeScript Interfaces
69	
70	```typescript
71	// packages/mcp-server/src/types.ts
72	
73	export enum GatewayMode {
74	  Bootstrap = 'bootstrap',  // Shadow: observe only, no enrichment
75	  Recommend = 'recommend',  // Informational enrichment
76	  Assist = 'assist',        // Directional with warnings
77	  Auto = 'auto',            // Silent rerouting
78	}
79	
80	export interface UpstreamServer {
81	  name: string;             // Tool prefix (e.g. "github", "database")
82	  url: string;              // MCP server URL
83	  apiKey?: string;          // Optional per-upstream auth
84	  healthCheckIntervalMs?: number;  // Default 30_000
85	}
86	
87	export interface GatewayConfig {
88	  port: number;
89	  upstreamServers: UpstreamServer[];
90	  mode: GatewayMode;
91	  modeOverrides: Record<string, GatewayMode>;  // Per task_type
92	  liApiBaseUrl: string;
93	  liApiKey: string;
94	  shadowMode: boolean;        // Observe without injection
95	  environment: 'staging' | 'production';
96	  logLevel: 'debug' | 'info' | 'warn' | 'error';
97	}
98	
99	export interface EnrichedTool {
100	  name: string;
101	  description: string;       // ENRICHED — original woven with historical context
102	  inputSchema: object;       // UNMODIFIED — passthrough from upstream
103	  upstreamName: string;      // Which upstream server owns this tool
104	  annotations?: {
105	    ranking?: number;        // 1-based rank within task (best=1)
106	    category?: 'recommended' | 'neutral' | 'warning';
107	  };
108	}
109	
110	export interface EnrichmentContext {
111	  taskType: string;
112	  customerId: string;
113	  agentId: string;
114	  mode: GatewayMode;
115	  scores: ScoredAction[];    // From scoring.ts
116	  policyDecision: PolicyDecision;
117	}
118	
119	export interface DecisionRecord {
120	  decisionId: string;        // dec_{ts12}_{agent4}_{rand4}
121	  agentId: string;
122	  customerId: string;
123	  taskType: string;
124	  actionName: string;
125	  upstreamName: string;
126	  originalAction: string;    // What agent chose
127	  executedAction: string;    // What actually ran (may differ in Auto)
128	  mode: GatewayMode;
129	  rerouted: boolean;
130	  enrichmentScores: Record<string, number>;
131	  timestamp: string;         // ISO 8601
132	}
133	
134	export interface Episode {
135	  episodeId: string;
136	  agentId: string;
137	  sessionStart: string;
138	  decisions: string[];       // decisionIds in order
139	  coachingCount: number;     // Max 3
140	}
141	
142	export interface WebhookCallback {
143	  decisionId: string;
144	  layer: 2 | 3;              // Layer 2 = session, Layer 3 = business
145	  success: boolean;
146	  reason?: string;
147	  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
148	  timestamp: string;
149	}
150	
151	export interface FailOpenState {
152	  upstreamFailures: Map<string, number>;   // Per-upstream failure count
153	  circuitBreakerOpen: Map<string, boolean>;
154	  lastHealthCheck: Map<string, Date>;
155	  totalRequests: number;
156	  passthroughRequests: number;  // Requests that bypassed LI entirely
157	}
158	```
159	
160	### 2.2 Cache Key Patterns (10 keys, all `customer_id`-namespaced)
161	
162	```typescript
163	// packages/mcp-server/src/cache-keys.ts
164	
165	const PREFIX = 'li';
166	const SEP = ':';
167	
168	export const CacheKeys = {
169	  // Scoring data for enrichment (5-min TTL, from scoring.ts LRU)
170	  score: (cust: string, task: string) =>
171	    `${PREFIX}${SEP}score${SEP}${cust}${SEP}${task}`,
172	
173	  // Enriched tool descriptions (60s TTL — balances freshness with latency)
174	  enrich: (cust: string, task: string, tool: string) =>
175	    `${PREFIX}${SEP}enrich${SEP}${cust}${SEP}${task}${SEP}${tool}`,
176	
177	  // Upstream tool list cache (30s TTL — tools don't change often)
178	  upstreamTools: (name: string) =>
179	    `${PREFIX}${SEP}upstream${SEP}tools${SEP}${name}`,
180	
181	  // Mode resolution per task_type (5-min TTL)
182	  mode: (cust: string, task: string) =>
183	    `${PREFIX}${SEP}mode${SEP}${cust}${SEP}${task}`,
184	
185	  // Trust score per agent (60s TTL)
186	  trust: (cust: string, agent: string) =>
187	    `${PREFIX}${SEP}trust${SEP}${cust}${SEP}${agent}`,
188	
189	  // Episode state (30-min TTL — session duration)
190	  episode: (cust: string, agent: string) =>
191	    `${PREFIX}${SEP}episode${SEP}${cust}${SEP}${agent}`,
192	
193	  // Shadow mode comparison data (5-min TTL)
194	  shadow: (cust: string, task: string) =>
195	    `${PREFIX}${SEP}shadow${SEP}${cust}${SEP}${task}`,
196	
197	  // Global cold-start priors (24h TTL — rarely changes)
198	  globalPriors: (task: string) =>
199	    `${PREFIX}${SEP}global${SEP}priors${SEP}${task}`,
200

551	### 3.6 SDK Isolation (Keep But Remove Relationship)
552	
553	The TypeScript and Python SDKs (`packages/typescript-sdk/`, `packages/python-sdk/`) are KEPT on disk for future reference. The isolation plan:
554

556	2. **Disable CI/CD**: Comment out `publish-npm-sdk.yml` and `publish-python-sdk.yml` in CI matrix.
557	3. **Mark deprecated**: Add deprecation notice to SDK READMEs: "LayerInfinite is now an MCP gateway. These SDKs are deprecated. Use the MCP integration instead (4 lines of JSON config)."

They serve the `/v1/import` route (bulk historical data import). These are NOT SDK wrappers — they're import infrastructure.
561

563	
564	## 4. Phase-by-Phase Implementation
565	
566	### Phase 0: Preparation (Day 1)
567	
568	**Step 0.1 — SDK Isolation**
569	- Comment out `publish-npm-sdk.yml` and `publish-python-sdk.yml` in CI matrix
570	- Add deprecation notice to SDK READMEs
571	- Verify zero gateway imports from SDK packages
572	- Verify LangChain/LangGraph adapters are self-contained (no SDK dependency)
573	
574	**Step 0.2 — Create Directory Scaffold**
575	- `packages/mcp-server/src/enrichment/` directory
576	- `packages/mcp-server/src/resources/` directory (add to existing)
577	- `layer5/api/lib/` — new files go alongside existing lib files
578	- `layer5/api/routes/` — new routes go alongside existing routes
579	
580	**Step 0.3 — Extend Config**
581	- Rewrite `packages/mcp-server/src/config.ts` with new `GatewayConfig` interface
582	- Add env vars: `LAYERINFINITE_UPSTREAM_TOOLS`, `LAYERINFINITE_SHADOW_MODE`, `LAYERINFINITE_ENVIRONMENT`
583	- Parse `UPSTREAM_TOOLS` JSON: `[{"name":"github","url":"https://github.mcp","apiKey":"..."}]`
584	- Validate mode overrides format: `{"build_failed":"auto","ci_timeout":"recommend"}`
585	
586	**Step 0.4 — DB Schema Migration (132)**
587	```sql
588	-- Drop old constraint
589	ALTER TABLE fact_outcomes
590	  DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fact_outcomes_ingestion_source_check;
591	
592	-- Add new constraint with 'mcp'
593	ALTER TABLE fact_outcomes
594	  ADD CONSTRAINT fact_outcomes_ingestion_source_check
595	  CHECK (ingestion_source IN ('sdk', 'import', 'mcp'));
596	
597	-- Update comment
598	COMMENT ON COLUMN fact_outcomes.ingestion_source IS
599	  'Origin of outcome: sdk (legacy agent SDK), import (bulk historical upload), mcp (gateway proxy)';
600	```
601	
602	**Validation Gate:** Config loads without errors. Migration applies cleanly. All existing tests pass (`npm test`).
603	
604	---
605	
606	### Phase 1: Gateway Proxy Core (Days 2-3)
607	
608	**Step 1.1 — Upstream Registry** (`upstream-registry.ts`)
609	- Parse `LAYERINFINITE_UPSTREAM_TOOLS` JSON
610	- Maintain Map<name, UpstreamServer>
611	- Health check loop: every 30s, ping each upstream's health endpoint
612	- Track failure counts per upstream for circuit breaker
613	- Expose: `getUpstream(name): UpstreamServer | undefined`
614	- Expose: `getAllUpstreams(): UpstreamServer[]`
615	- Expose: `isHealthy(name): boolean`
616	
617	**Step 1.2 — Upstream MCP Connector** (rewrite `rest-client.ts`)
618	- Two concerns in one file (OK under 500 lines):
619	  - **MCP Proxy**: Connect to upstream MCP servers, forward `tools/list` and `tools/call`
620	  - **LI API Client**: Call LI REST API for scores, log outcomes, fetch enrichment data
621	- Use raw `fetch()` with AbortController (zero new deps)
622	- Separate timeout per concern: MCP proxy 30s (simulation), LI API 15s
623	- Retry logic: 2 retries for 429/502/503/504, no retry for 400/401/403/404
624	
625	**Step 1.3 — Gateway Proxy** (`gateway-proxy.ts`)
626	- **CRITICAL**: Use low-level MCP `Server` + custom `Transport`, NOT `McpServer`
627	- `McpServer` is a high-level abstraction that registers tools. Gateway needs to intercept raw JSON-RPC messages before tool registration happens.
628	- Implementation approach:
629	  ```typescript
630	  import { Server } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/index.js';
631	  import { StdioServerTransport } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js';
632	  // OR custom StreamableHTTPServerTransport for HTTP
633	  ```
634	- Intercept `tools/list`:
635	  1. Agent requests tools → Gateway receives request
636	  2. Gateway fetches tools from ALL upstream MCP servers in parallel
637	  3. Gateway fetches scores from LI API (scoring.ts → 6-factor composite)
638	  4. Gateway enriches tool descriptions with historical context (per mode)
639	  5. Gateway adds virtual `li_recommend` tool
640	  6. Gateway returns enriched tool list to agent
641	- Intercept `tools/call`:
642	  1. Agent calls a tool → Gateway receives request
643	  2. Gateway extracts tool name, identifies upstream server
644	  3. **Auto mode only**: Gateway checks if reroute is needed → if yes, replaces tool call
645	  4. Gateway generates `decision_id`
646	  5. Gateway forwards to real upstream MCP server
647	  6. Gateway returns result to agent immediately (no blocking)
648	  7. Gateway logs outcome to LI API ASYNC (fire-and-forget with local disk queue fallback)
649	
650	**Step 1.4 — Server Rewrite** (rewrite `index.ts`)
651	- Export `createGatewayServer(config)` function
652	- Uses low-level `Server` from MCP SDK with custom request handler
653	- Registers NO tools — only intercepts `tools/list` and `tools/call`
654	- Adds resources: `layerinfinite://dashboard`, `layerinfinite://docs`
655	- Adds prompt: `layerinfinite-onboarding`
656	
657	**Step 1.5 — Fail-Open Layer** (`fail-open.ts`)
658	```
659	Layer 1: Async logging fails → write to local disk queue (`.li-queue/`) → retry with exponential backoff
660	Layer 2: LI API unreachable → gateway fails open → agent executes directly → telemetry queued on disk
661	Layer 3: Everything fails → agent executes as if LI doesn't exist → zero footprint → developer notified via webhook
662	```
663	- Circuit breaker: 3 consecutive upstream failures → open for 60s → half-open probe → close or stay open
664	- `FailOpenState` tracked in-memory with periodic disk persistence
665	- Webhook notification on circuit breaker state change
666	
667	**Validation Gate:** Gateway starts. `tools/list` returns enriched tool descriptions from a single upstream. `tools/call` proxies correctly. Fail-open triggers when upstream is killed.
668	
669	---
670	
671	### Phase 2: Tool Enrichment Engine (Days 3-4)
672	
673	**Step 2.1 — Score Fetcher** (`enrichment/score-fetcher.ts`)
674	- Calls LI API `/v1/get-scores` for current task_type
675	- Caches results in Hot layer (5-min TTL, 1000-entry LRU)
676	- Returns `ScoredAction[]` with composite scores
677	- Handles cold start: if no scores available, returns empty array (enrichment formatters handle cold start gracefully)
678	- Timeout: 500ms → cache hit or return empty (never block agent)
679	
680	**Step 2.2 — Recommend Mode Formatter** (`enrichment/format-recommend.ts`)
681	- `formatRecommendEnrichment(desc, tool, task, successRate, sampleSize, trend?) → string`
682	- Cold start (sampleSize < 3): "Insufficient historical data..."
683	- Limited data (sampleSize < 10): "Historically... (limited data: N outcomes)"
684	- Sufficient data (sampleSize >= 10): "Historically... N% (N outcomes)"
685	- Optional trend note: "Success rate is improving."
686	
687	**Step 2.3 — Assist Mode Formatter** (`enrichment/format-assist.ts`)
688	- `formatAssistRecommendation(desc, tool, task, successRate, sampleSize, rank, total) → string`
689	- Best tool with clear margin: "This is the recommended tool..."
690	- Close race (gap ≤ 5%): "Tied for best option..."
691	- Not best: "Ranked #N/M..."
692	- `formatAssistWarning(desc, tool, task, failRate, sampleSize, alternative) → string`
693	- "WARNING: This tool has FAILED on {task} {X}% of the time..."
694	
695	**Step 2.4 — Enrichment Engine** (`tool-enrichment.ts`)
696	- `enrichToolList(tools, context): EnrichedTool[]`
697	- For each upstream tool:
698	  1. Look up score for (task_type, tool_name) in enrichment context
699	  2. Apply mode-specific formatter
700	  3. Return enriched description, UNMODIFIED inputSchema
701	- **CRITICAL**: `inputSchema` is NEVER modified — only `description` is enriched
702	- Adds `li_recommend` as last tool in list
703	
704	**Step 2.5 — Mode Manager** (`mode-manager.ts`)
705	- `resolveMode(taskType, config): GatewayMode`
706	- Checks per-task-type overrides first
707	- Falls back to global mode config
708	- Caches resolution (5-min TTL per task type)
709	- Graduated trust levels enforced: cannot jump from Bootstrap to Auto without explicit config
710	
711	**Step 2.6 — Virtual li_recommend Tool** (`li-recommend-tool.ts`)
712	- Added to every `tools/list` response
713	- Handler: calls LI API `/v1/recommendations`, returns ranked list
714	- Response format:
715	  ```
716	  Recommendations for "build_failed":
717	  1. push_fix — 84% success (234 outcomes)
718	  2. rollback — 31% success (189 outcomes) ⚠️ BELOW THRESHOLD
719	  3. restart_service — 67% success (156 outcomes)
720	  ```
721	
722	**Validation Gate:** Tools enriched correctly for each mode. Recommend shows informational context. Assist shows directional guidance + warnings. Auto returns unchanged descriptions. `li_recommend` returns ranked results. Cold start handled gracefully.
723	
724	---
725	
726	### Phase 3: Decision Tracking + Business Webhooks (Days 4-5)
727	
728	**Step 3.1 — Decision Tracker** (`decision-tracker.ts`)
729	- `generateDecisionId(agentId): string` — base62-encoded, sortable, collision-resistant
730	- `startEpisode(agentId): string` — new episode_id for session
731	- `recordDecision(record): void` — log decision to in-memory buffer
732	- Flush buffer to LI API every 5s (or every decision in Auto mode)
733	- Local disk queue fallback (`writeFileSync` to `.li-queue/decisions.jsonl`)
734	
735	**Step 3.2 — Orchestrator Update** (modify `outcome-orchestrator.ts`)
736	- Accept `decision_id` in outcome payload
737	- Link Layer 2/3 callbacks via `decision_id` lookup
738	- SCORE OVERWRITE logic:
739	  ```
740	  Layer 1 (technical): initial score from gateway inference
741	  Layer 2 (session): webhook callback overwrites score
742	  Layer 3 (business): webhook callback overwrites again
743	  ```
744	- Cold append-only log preserves full timeline (all three writes recorded)
745	
746	**Step 3.3 — Webhook Verifier** (`webhook-verifier.ts`)
747	- Replaces current silent no-op `verifier.ts` webhook path
748	- Signature verification: HMAC-SHA256 with shared secret

- Expose: `getAllUpstreams(): UpstreamServer[]`
- Expose: `isHealthy(name): boolean`

**Step 1.2 — Upstream MCP Connector** (rewrite `rest-client.ts`)
- Two concerns in one file (OK under 500 lines):
  - **MCP Proxy**: Connect to upstream MCP servers, forward `tools/list` and `tools/call`
  - **LI API Client**: Call LI REST API for scores, log outcomes, fetch enrichment data
- Use raw `fetch()` with AbortController (zero new deps)
- Separate timeout per concern: MCP proxy 30s (simulation), LI API 15s
- Retry logic: 2 retries for 429/502/503/504, no retry for 400/401/403/404

**Step 1.3 — Gateway Proxy** (`gateway-proxy.ts`)
- **CRITICAL**: Use low-level MCP `Server` + custom `Transport`, NOT `McpServer`
- `McpServer` is a high-level abstraction that registers tools. Gateway needs to intercept raw JSON-RPC messages before tool registration happens.
- Implementation approach:
  ```typescript
  import { Server } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/index.js';
  import { StdioServerTransport } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js';
  // OR custom StreamableHTTPServerTransport for HTTP
  ```
- Intercept `tools/list`:
  1. Agent requests tools → Gateway receives request
  2. Gateway fetches tools from ALL upstream MCP servers in parallel
  3. Gateway fetches scores from LI API (scoring.ts → 6-factor composite)
  4. Gateway enriches tool descriptions with historical context (per mode)
  5. Gateway adds virtual `li_recommend` tool
  6. Gateway returns enriched tool list to agent
- Intercept `tools/call`:
  1. Agent calls a tool → Gateway receives request
  2. Gateway extracts tool name, identifies upstream server
  3. **Auto mode only**: Gateway checks if reroute is needed → if yes, replaces tool call
  4. Gateway generates `decision_id`
  5. Gateway forwards to real upstream MCP server
  6. Gateway returns result to agent immediately (no blocking)
  7. Gateway logs outcome to LI API ASYNC (fire-and-forget with local disk queue fallback)

**Step 1.4 — Server Rewrite** (rewrite `index.ts`)
- Export `createGatewayServer(config)` function
- Uses low-level `Server` from MCP SDK with custom request handler
- Registers NO tools — only intercepts `tools/list` and `tools/call`
- Adds resources: `layerinfinite://dashboard`, `layerinfinite://docs`
- Adds prompt: `layerinfinite-onboarding`

**Step 1.5 — Fail-Open Layer** (`fail-open.ts`)
```
Layer 1: Async logging fails → write to local disk queue (`.li-queue/`) → retry with exponential backoff
Layer 2: LI API unreachable → gateway fails open → agent executes directly → telemetry queued on disk
Layer 3: Everything fails → agent executes as if LI doesn't exist → zero footprint → developer notified via webhook
```
- Circuit breaker: 3 consecutive upstream failures → open for 60s → half-open probe → close or stay open
- `FailOpenState` tracked in-memory with periodic disk persistence
- Webhook notification on circuit breaker state change

**Validation Gate:** Gateway starts. `tools/list` returns enriched tool descriptions from a single upstream. `tools/call` proxies correctly. Fail-open triggers when upstream is killed.

---

### Phase 2: Tool Enrichment Engine (Days 3-4)

**Step 2.1 — Score Fetcher** (`enrichment/score-fetcher.ts`)
- Calls LI API `/v1/get-scores` for current task_type
- Caches results in Hot layer (5-min TTL, 1000-entry LRU)
- Returns `ScoredAction[]` with composite scores
- Handles cold start: if no scores available, returns empty array (enrichment formatters handle cold start gracefully)
- Timeout: 500ms → cache hit or return empty (never block agent)

**Step 2.2 — Recommend Mode Formatter** (`enrichment/format-recommend.ts`)
- `formatRecommendEnrichment(desc, tool, task, successRate, sampleSize, trend?) → string`
- Cold start (sampleSize < 3): "Insufficient historical data..."
- Limited data (sampleSize < 10): "Historically... (limited data: N outcomes)"
- Sufficient data (sampleSize >= 10): "Historically... N% (N outcomes)"
- Optional trend note: "Success rate is improving."

**Step 2.3 — Assist Mode Formatter** (`enrichment/format-assist.ts`)
- `formatAssistRecommendation(desc, tool, task, successRate, sampleSize, rank, total) → string`
- Best tool with clear margin: "This is the recommended tool..."
- Close race (gap ≤ 5%): "Tied for best option..."
- Not best: "Ranked #N/M..."
- `formatAssistWarning(desc, tool, task, failRate, sampleSize, alternative) → string`
- "WARNING: This tool has FAILED on {task} {X}% of the time..."

**Step 2.4 — Enrichment Engine** (`tool-enrichment.ts`)
- `enrichToolList(tools, context): EnrichedTool[]`
- For each upstream tool:
  1. Look up score for (task_type, tool_name) in enrichment context
  2. Apply mode-specific formatter
  3. Return enriched description, UNMODIFIED inputSchema
- **CRITICAL**: `inputSchema` is NEVER modified — only `description` is enriched
- Adds `li_recommend` as last tool in list

**Step 2.5 — Mode Manager** (`mode-manager.ts`)
- `resolveMode(taskType, config): GatewayMode`
- Checks per-task-type overrides first
- Falls back to global mode config
- Caches resolution (5-min TTL per task type)
- Graduated trust levels enforced: cannot jump from Bootstrap to Auto without explicit config

**Step 2.6 — Virtual li_recommend Tool** (`li-recommend-tool.ts`)
- Added to every `tools/list` response
- Handler: calls LI API `/v1/recommendations`, returns ranked list
- Response format:
  ```
  Recommendations for "build_failed":
  1. push_fix — 84% success (234 outcomes)
  2. rollback — 31% success (189 outcomes) ⚠️ BELOW THRESHOLD
  3. restart_service — 67% success (156 outcomes)
  ```

**Validation Gate:** Tools enriched correctly for each mode. Recommend shows informational context. Assist shows directional guidance + warnings. Auto returns unchanged descriptions. `li_recommend` returns ranked results. Cold start handled gracefully.

---

### Phase 3: Decision Tracking + Business Webhooks (Days 4-5)

**Step 3.1 — Decision Tracker** (`decision-tracker.ts`)
- `generateDecisionId(agentId): string` — base62-encoded, sortable, collision-resistant
- `startEpisode(agentId): string` — new episode_id for session
- `recordDecision(record): void` — log decision to in-memory buffer
- Flush buffer to LI API every 5s (or every decision in Auto mode)
- Local disk queue fallback (`writeFileSync` to `.li-queue/decisions.jsonl`)

**Step 3.2 — Orchestrator Update** (modify `outcome-orchestrator.ts`)
- Accept `decision_id` in outcome payload
- Link Layer 2/3 callbacks via `decision_id` lookup
- SCORE OVERWRITE logic:
  ```
  Layer 1 (technical): initial score from gateway inference
  Layer 2 (session): webhook callback overwrites score
  Layer 3 (business): webhook callback overwrites again
  ```
- Cold append-only log preserves full timeline (all three writes recorded)

**Step 3.3 — Webhook Verifier** (`webhook-verifier.ts`)
- Replaces current silent no-op `verifier.ts` webhook path
- Signature verification: HMAC-SHA256 with shared secret

1	/**
2	 * LayerInfinite MCP Server — index.ts
3	 * ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
4	 * Main server entry point. Creates the McpServer instance and
5	 * conditionally registers tools based on the configured mode.
6	 *
7	 * Tool Registration Matrix:
8	 * ┌─────────────────────┬───────────┬───────────┬────────┬──────┐
9	 * │ Tool                │ Bootstrap │ Recommend │ Assist │ Auto │
10	 * ├─────────────────────┼───────────┼───────────┼────────┼──────┤
11	 * │ li_log              │     ✅    │     ✅    │   ✅   │  ✅  │
12	 * │ li_observe          │     ✅    │     ✅    │   ✅   │  ✅  │
13	 * │ li_audit            │     ✅    │     ✅    │   ✅   │  ✅  │
14	 * │ li_health           │     ✅    │     ✅    │   ✅   │  ✅  │
15	 * │ li_toggle_action    │     ✅    │     ✅    │   ✅   │  ✅  │
16	 * │ li_simulate         │           │     ✅    │   ✅   │  ✅  │
17	 * │ li_patterns         │           │     ✅    │   ✅   │  ✅  │
18	 * │ li_action           │           │           │   ✅   │  ✅  │
19	 * │ li_fallback         │           │           │   ✅   │  ✅  │
20	 * │ li_register_action  │ admin key │ admin key │admin   │admin │
21	 * └─────────────────────┴───────────┴───────────┴────────┴──────┘
22	 *
23	 * Resource (always): layerinfinite://tasks/{task_name}
24	 * Prompt  (always):  layerinfinite-setup
25	 * ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
26	 */
27	
28	import { McpServer, ResourceTemplate } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js';
29	import { loadConfig } from './config.js';
30	import { RestClient } from './rest-client.js';
31	import { EpisodeTracker } from './episode-tracker.js';
32	import { logger } from './logger.js';
33	
34	// ── Tool imports ────────────────────────────────────────────
35	import { LI_LOG_NAME, LI_LOG_DESCRIPTION, liLogSchema, createLiLogHandler } from './tools/li-log.js';
36	import { LI_OBSERVE_NAME, LI_OBSERVE_DESCRIPTION, liObserveSchema, createLiObserveHandler } from './tools/li-observe.js';
37	import { LI_AUDIT_NAME, LI_AUDIT_DESCRIPTION, liAuditSchema, createLiAuditHandler } from './tools/li-audit.js';
38	import { LI_HEALTH_NAME, LI_HEALTH_DESCRIPTION, liHealthSchema, createLiHealthHandler } from './tools/li-health.js';
39	import { LI_TOGGLE_ACTION_NAME, LI_TOGGLE_ACTION_DESCRIPTION, liToggleActionSchema, createLiToggleActionHandler } from './tools/li-toggle-action.js';
40	import { LI_ACTION_NAME, getLiActionDescription, liActionSchema, createLiActionHandler } from './tools/li-action.js';
41	import { LI_FALLBACK_NAME, LI_FALLBACK_DESCRIPTION, liFallbackSchema, createLiFallbackHandler } from './tools/li-fallback.js';
42	import { LI_SIMULATE_NAME, LI_SIMULATE_DESCRIPTION, liSimulateSchema, createLiSimulateHandler } from './tools/li-simulate.js';
43	import { LI_PATTERNS_NAME, LI_PATTERNS_DESCRIPTION, liPatternsSchema, createLiPatternsHandler } from './tools/li-patterns.js';
44	import { LI_REGISTER_ACTION_NAME, LI_REGISTER_ACTION_DESCRIPTION, liRegisterActionSchema, createLiRegisterActionHandler } from './tools/li-register-action.js';
45	
46	// ── Resource + prompt imports ───────────────────────────────
47	import { createTaskIntelligenceReader } from './resources/task-intelligence.js';
48	import { AGENT_SETUP_PROMPT_NAME, AGENT_SETUP_PROMPT_DESCRIPTION, getAgentSetupPrompt } from './prompts/agent-setup.js';
49	
50	/**
51	 * Creates and configures the McpServer with all tools, resources, and prompts.
52	 */
53	export function createServer() {
54	  const config = loadConfig();
55	  const client = new RestClient(config);
56	  const episodeTracker = new EpisodeTracker();
57	  const mode = config.mode;
58	
59	  const server = new McpServer({
60	    name: 'layerinfinite',
61	    version: '1.0.0',
62	  });
63	
64	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
65	  // ALWAYS REGISTERED — Foundation tools (bootstrap + all modes)
66	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
67	
68	  server.tool(
69	    LI_LOG_NAME,
70	    LI_LOG_DESCRIPTION,
71	    liLogSchema,
72	    createLiLogHandler(client),
73	  );
74	
75	  server.tool(
76	    LI_OBSERVE_NAME,
77	    LI_OBSERVE_DESCRIPTION,
78	    liObserveSchema,
79	    createLiObserveHandler(client),
80	  );
81	
82	  server.tool(
83	    LI_AUDIT_NAME,
84	    LI_AUDIT_DESCRIPTION,
85	    liAuditSchema,
86	    createLiAuditHandler(client),
87	  );
88	
89	  server.tool(
90	    LI_HEALTH_NAME,
91	    LI_HEALTH_DESCRIPTION,
92	    liHealthSchema,
93	    createLiHealthHandler(client, config),
94	  );
95	
96	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
97	  // CIRCUIT BREAKER — Runtime action disable/enable (all modes)
98	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
99	
100	  server.tool(
101	    LI_TOGGLE_ACTION_NAME,
102	    LI_TOGGLE_ACTION_DESCRIPTION,
103	    liToggleActionSchema,
104	    createLiToggleActionHandler(client),
105	  );
106	
107	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
108	  // MODE-GATED — Intelligence tools (recommend + assist + auto)
109	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
110	
111	  if (mode) {
112	    server.tool(
113	      LI_SIMULATE_NAME,
114	      LI_SIMULATE_DESCRIPTION,
115	      liSimulateSchema,
116	      createLiSimulateHandler(client),
117	    );
118	
119	    server.tool(
120	      LI_PATTERNS_NAME,
121	      LI_PATTERNS_DESCRIPTION,
122	      liPatternsSchema,
123	      createLiPatternsHandler(client),
124	    );
125	  }
126	
127	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
128	  // DECISION LAYER — Gateway + Fallback (assist + auto only)
129	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
130	
131	  if (mode === 'assist' || mode === 'auto') {
132	    server.tool(
133	      LI_ACTION_NAME,
134	      getLiActionDescription(mode),
135	      liActionSchema,
136	      createLiActionHandler(client, config, episodeTracker),
137	    );
138	
139	    server.tool(
140	      LI_FALLBACK_NAME,
141	      LI_FALLBACK_DESCRIPTION,
142	      liFallbackSchema,
143	      createLiFallbackHandler(client, episodeTracker),
144	    );
145	  }
146	
147	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
148	  // ADMIN — Gated by LAYERINFINITE_ADMIN_KEY
149	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
150	
151	  if (config.adminKey) {
152	    server.tool(
153	      LI_REGISTER_ACTION_NAME,
154	      LI_REGISTER_ACTION_DESCRIPTION,
155	      liRegisterActionSchema,
156	      createLiRegisterActionHandler(client, config.adminKey),
157	    );
158	  }
159	
160	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
161	  // RESOURCE — Decision intelligence (always active)
162	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
163	
164	  const taskReader = createTaskIntelligenceReader(client, config);
165	
166	  server.resource(
167	    'task-intelligence',
168	    new ResourceTemplate('layerinfinite://tasks/{task_name}', {
169	      list: undefined,
170	    }),
171	    taskReader,
172	  );
173	
174	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
175	  // PROMPT — Mode-aware agent configuration (always active)
176	  // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
177	
178	  server.prompt(
179	    AGENT_SETUP_PROMPT_NAME,
180	    AGENT_SETUP_PROMPT_DESCRIPTION,
181	    () => getAgentSetupPrompt(config),
182	  );
183	
184	  // ── Startup log ───────────────────────────────────────────
185	  const toolCount = 5 // foundation (4) + circuit breaker (1)
186	    + (mode ? 2 : 0) // intelligence
187	    + (mode === 'assist' || mode === 'auto' ? 2 : 0) // decision layer
188	    + (config.adminKey ? 1 : 0); // admin
189	
190	  logger.info('Server configured', {
191	    mode: mode ?? 'bootstrap',
192	    tools: toolCount,
193	    admin: config.adminKey ? 'enabled' : 'disabled',
194	    api: config.baseUrl,
195	  });
196	
197	  return server;
198	}
